title: G3 — v0.10 freeze geometry (12 mm disc; C_R 789 pF)
description: Clone of G2-geometry-r2 with the v0.10 freeze C_R revision: the garolite septum disc went 8->12 mm, pinning C_R 960->789 pF at the r387 electrode (f0 637 kHz, Z0 316 ohm). Lowers the single-kick reach floor 108->89 mJ and improves the M2 island-dump match eta 96->99% (648 pF island ~ 789 pF tank). C1/C2 (16/280), Cx (8/648), Ca/Cb (309), Cpar (20) UNCHANGED from G2. G1/G2 NOT mutated (records of the pre-freeze geometries). Consumed by sim/s2recheck_s3_spark.py via Params.cx_min/cx_max (Cx) + set_device_caps (C1/C2/Ca/Cb/Cpar); the tank C_R=789 pF + L_R=79 uH drive the resonator_sim ring. No new hook, no frozen edit.

c1max.why: C1 peak (pF): unchanged from G2; r387, 7.0 mm air.

cx3min.why: Cx3 collapsed (pF): unchanged from G2 (grown island).

cx3max.why: Cx3 plateau (pF): unchanged from G2; ~ tank C_R for 99% match.

cR.why: C_R rotor-rotor (pF): REVISED 960->789 (12 mm garolite disc at r387; 15 kV/12 mm = 1.25 kV/mm holdoff). RECORD ONLY for the pump (shorts 5-6); sets the S3 ring tank cap -> f0 637 kHz, Z0 316 ohm, reach floor 89 mJ.

cpar.why: per-node stray (pF): unchanged; solver default CPAR.

provenance.tank: C_R 789 pF + L_R 79 uH -> f0 637 kHz, Z0 316 ohm (the only change from G2 is the disc 8->12 mm -> C_R 960->789 pF).
provenance.fire_window_kV: 16.6-21 (island fire >=16.6 kV delivers 89 mJ at eta 99%; C1/C2 7 mm air gaps cap the island at ~21 kV).

cR.why: locked (record only for the pump; sets the tank).

anchorZ.why: G0 degenerate-limit anchor at the G3 caps (= G2/G1; galvanic_z independent of Cx/C_R).
